content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 15, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 15, 2026, focused on stabilizing the cloud infrastructure. The team successfully patched critical pricing, privacy, and security vulnerabilities within the live-ai-pricing implementation and initiated refinements to authentication handling.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### AI Pricing and Security Patches
*   Addressed critical bugs and security vulnerabilities identified during the audit of the live-ai-pricing implementation.
*   Implemented the Seedance 2.0 parser and updated the model catalog to include Seedance 2.0 and 2.0 Fast.
*   Updated database schemas and repositories to support generation privacy settings.
*   Refactored pricing summary and generation routes to ensure stability.
*   Relevant PR: [#456](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/456)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#457](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/457): fix: move steward passthrough after bearerToken declaration. This PR addresses the ordering of authentication logic.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
